_schema: YouTube channel base for the yt-research radar. Each item: handle (no @), name, url, channel_id, subs, lang, niche, cadence, note, added. Feed handles to yt_search.py --handles.
_note: Template — populate with your own niche's channels. Two examples below; replace them.

channels.name: Tech With Tim
channels.niche: AI coding workflows, building AI agents — hands-on dev tutorials

channels.name: Traversy Media
channels.niche: Dev crash courses + opinions on AI for developers
